transcript.content: this call may be recorded for quality and training purposes. para español, oprima el dos.
Okay, thanks for letting me know. Can I speak to someone about scheduling an appointment?
thanks for calling pivot point orthopedics, part of pretty good ai. am i speaking with sarah?
No, this is Lisa Park. I called about three weeks ago and was told someone would call me back to schedule an appointment, but I never got that call. I just really need to get this booked now.
may i have your first name, last name, and date of birth?
It's Lisa Park, and my date of birth is September 3 1990. Like I said, I called a few weeks ago and was supposed to get a callback to schedule, but it never happened.
to assist you, i need to confirm your date of birth. is your date of birth correct as previously provided? if not, please provide the correct date of birth.
Yeah, it's correct. September 3 1990. Can we just go ahead and get an appointment set up now? I've been waiting for weeks.
can you please provide the spelling of your first and last name?
I already gave you my name— it's Lisa Park. L-I-S-A P-A-R-K. Can we skip the repeats and just schedule the appointment? I called because I was told someone would call me back and it never happened.
can you please provide your phone number?
It's 3135550419. I've called before and was told someone would get back to me to schedule, but no one did. I'd really like to just get this booked now.

i'm sorry for the delay and the trouble you've had. right now, i can't transfer you to a live agent because this is a demo clinic. in a real clinic, you'd be connected to a support team member to get this sorted right away. would you like me to document your request for follow-up, or is there anything
